name: Insufficient funds — fees in line with entitlement, cash cannot cover creditor shortfall
description: Both Nominee and Supervisor fees are drawn exactly to entitlement (no overdraw, no underdraw). Cash in hand after all fee draws and disbursements is £30.00. Creditor shortfall under the locked model is £111.77. No fee refund is available to top up the distribution. Expected: waterfall triggered, all £30.00 distributed to creditors, £81.77 flagged as unrecoverable.

locked_model.retention_rule: First 10 contributions retained for Nominee fee

expected.final_cashier_instruction_pattern: Distribute all remaining funds to creditors
expected.omni_fee_notes_pattern: No fee movement; case closing with creditor shortfall unrecoverable

notes: cash_required_full_entitlement = 0 (no further fee draws) + 111.77 (creditor shortfall) = 111.77. Cash in hand ≈ 30.94. Waterfall: Step A — no overdraw; Step B — cash unchanged; Step C — distribute £30.94, £80.83 unrecoverable. Figures are approximate; test validates direction, not exact pence.
